title: Amtech S5910 10 Piece M6 x 50mm expansion bolts
features: HEAVY DUTY: These heavy duty M6 x 50mm rawl type expansion bolts have a zinc passivated finish for maximum protection
VERSATILE: Suitable for fixing concrete, stone and brickwork, they have many applications, including ladder restraints, light fixings, safety chains, barriers and shelving
EASY TO HANDLE: Ergonomic build supports fatigue-free use
LIGHTWEIGHT TOOL: Easy to carry and operate throughout the day
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1 x 10pc 6 X 50mm Expansion Bolts See more
